title: Castle Dragon
lesson: The dragon awaits! This is the final battle. Read every sentence to defeat the dragon and save the castle! You've trained for this!
sentences: The fish swam in a tub.
The bird is in the nest.
The dog can run with you.
We can shop and get gum.
The camp is near the pond.
The kid can spot the fox.
The cat can nap on the bed.
We can play in the yard.
